name: DataMate
description: DataMate is an enterprise-level data processing platform designed for model fine-tuning and RAG retrieval.
summaryZh: DataMate is an enterprise-level data processing platform designed for model fine-tuning and RAG retrieval.  它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
